title: ipomoea japonica
intro: Ipomoea japonica, also known as Japanese morning glory, is a perennial climbing vine native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antipyretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps, soothing digestive issues, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea japonica include infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which are often used to treat a range of ailments in traditional Chinese medicine.
